label: Geology & Earth Sciences
description:
Complete ICS 2024 geological time scale (eons, eras, periods, epochs), major and minor tectonic plates, boundary types, and geological concepts. Import scripts for IMA-approved minerals (RRUFF database) and active volcanoes (Smithsonian GVP).

Atom IDs: geo:time:eon:*, geo:time:era:*, geo:time:period:*, geo:time:epoch:*, geo:plate:*, mineral:*, geo:volcano:*
license: Public domain (ICS/USGS/RRUFF) + CC BY 4.0 (IMA mineral data)
size_hint: ~80 static + thousands from mineral/volcano import scripts
attribution: International Commission on Stratigraphy (ICS) | RRUFF Project / IMA | Smithsonian Global Volcanism Program
